tool_args.label: LIRR Main Line Third Track
tool_args.raw_text: Third Track: A Model Project at MTA

payload.description: 9.8 miles of new third track added on the LIRR Main Line, from Floral Park to Hicksville. 7 stations upgraded, 8 grade crossings eliminated, 7 bridges replaced, 7.5 miles sound attenuation/retaining walls. Design-Build contract awarded to 3TC. Project completed ahead of schedule and under budget.

tool_args.label: Board Approved Design-Build Contract
tool_args.raw_text: Dec 2017 – Board approved a Design-Build contract for 69 months

payload.description: MTA Board approved a Design-Build contract for the Third Track project for 69 months

tool_args.label: All Tracks Placed Into Operation
tool_args.raw_text: Oct 2022 – All tracks placed into operation after 57 months

payload.description: All Third Track project tracks placed into operation after 57 months, 12 months ahead of the original 69-month schedule

tool_args.label: Cost Containment Initiative Announced
tool_args.raw_text: Cost Containment Initiative announced in June 2018

payload.description: Cost Containment Initiative announced. Identified major drivers of cost and delay: unbalanced risks, layers of bureaucracy/red tape, weak project management.
New Third Track length on LIRR Main Line
payload.scope: LIRR Main Line, Floral Park to Hicksville

payload.description: Approved budget for Third Track project in 2017

$100 million reallocated from Third Track to other projects

8 grade crossings eliminated as part of the Third Track project
7 bridges replaced as part of the Third Track project
7.5 miles of sound attenuation/retaining walls built as part of the Third Track project
40% increase in LIRR service enabled by the Third Track project
